# Wrap

Wraps children onto multiple lines when space runs out, with consistent spacing.

## Import

```jsx
import { Wrap, WrapItem } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

### Wrap

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| gap | `string \| number` | - | Spacing between items |
| justify | `string` | - | Justify content |
| align | `string` | - | Align items |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Wrap items |

### WrapItem

Wrapper for each child element within Wrap.

## Usage

```jsx
<Wrap gap={4}>
  <WrapItem><Badge>Badge 1</Badge></WrapItem>
  <WrapItem><Badge>Badge 2</Badge></WrapItem>
  <WrapItem><Badge>Badge 3</Badge></WrapItem>
</Wrap>
```
